Natrum Arsenicosum.personality: A restless, irritable individual who desires to be left alone, preferring to lie down undisturbed yet finding no true comfort in any position. They are conscientious about trifles, easily angered by contradiction, and oscillate between loquacious hyperactivity and complete aversion to mental work or social engagement.
Natrum Arsenicosum.mental_state: Marked difficulty with concentration and mental exertion, especially indoors, with notable improvement in open air. The mind alternates between dullness, forgetfulness, and periods of excessive mental activity with racing ideas, alongside a growing sense of imbecility and prostration of mind.
Natrum Arsenicosum.emotional_pattern: Deep-seated anxiety that intensifies in the evening and at night in bed, accompanied by multiple fears — of crowds, of impending disease, of evil, and of people. A pervasive sadness and discontent underlies the temperament, punctuated by episodes of quarrelsomeness and impatience, with an overarching loathing of life and indifference to joy.
